lang.name: English
banner.subtitle: Spring Boot Integration
init.distributed.note: For production, use Kubernetes + Helm - this profile is intended for short demos only.
init.notSpring.hint: Run this command inside your Spring project root.
init.alreadyDetected: Contexa already detected in this project.
init.alreadyDetected.hint: Re-run with --force to overwrite settings, or --yes to accept defaults.
init.alreadyDetected.update: Contexa already detected - settings will be updated.
prompt.securityMode: Your project type (New project / Legacy system):
prompt.securityMode.full: New project     - Contexa handles login + security  (default)
prompt.securityMode.sandbox: Legacy system  - Keep your login, add AI security
prompt.mode.shadow: No, observe   - monitor and log only  (default)
prompt.mode.enforce: Yes, enforce  - detect and block immediately
prompt.llm: AI / LLM Model (space to select, enter to confirm):
prompt.llm.ollama: Ollama     - runs locally, no data leaves your server  (default)
prompt.llm.openai: OpenAI     - cloud API, fast (requires API key)
prompt.llm.anthropic: Anthropic  - cloud API, advanced (requires API key)
prompt.infra.skip: No  - I will set up infrastructure myself  (default)
step.dockerFailed: Docker start failed. Run manually: docker compose up -d
step.ollamaNotReady: Ollama not ready. Pull models manually: docker exec contexa-ollama ollama pull {0}
step.modelPullFailed: Model pull failed. Pull manually: docker exec contexa-ollama ollama pull {0}
init.seedPassword.title: Seed account password (admin / kim_manager / park_user / dev_lead):
init.seedPassword.note1: Save this password now - it is shown only once.
init.seedPassword.note2: Rotate after first login. Hash is stored in initdb/02-dml.sql.
next.step2: 2. Add to endpoints you want to protect:
next.shadowActive: Shadow mode active - analyze only, no blocking.
warn.security.title: Security checklist before exposing this deployment:
warn.security.envVars: Set CONTEXA_DB_PASSWORD / DB_PASSWORD before deploying outside this machine.
warn.security.gitignore: Verify application.yml is not committed with default credentials.
warn.security.demoUsers: Rotate seed account passwords (admin / kim_manager / park_user / dev_lead).
warn.security.shadowMode: SHADOW mode logs threats only. Run 'contexa mode --enforce' to actively block.
mode.notInstalled: Contexa not initialized. Run: contexa init
mode.noBlock: Contexa-managed block not found in application.yml.
scan.title: Configuration scan:
scan.notSpring: Not a Spring project (pom.xml or build.gradle missing).
scan.springSecurityMissing: Spring Security not detected (Legacy bridge mode)
scan.blockMissing: Contexa-managed block missing - run: contexa init
scan.defaultDbPassword: Default DB password detected. Set CONTEXA_DB_PASSWORD env var.
scan.apiKeyExposed: API key appears to be a literal value, not an environment placeholder.
scan.propertiesAndYml: Both application.properties and application.yml exist - one will shadow the other.
status.title: Contexa status:
prompt.infra.distributed: Yes - install distributed (Postgres + Ollama + Redis + Kafka)
